---
title: "My Data Scientist's Toolbox Project"
author: "Chen"
date: "2026-07-07"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
data(mtcars)
head(mtcars)

summary(mtcars$mpg)
```

### Here is a simple plot

```{r, echo=TRUE}
plot(mtcars$hp, mtcars$mpg, 
     main = "Horsepower vs MPG",
     xlab = "Horsepower", 
     ylab = "Miles Per Gallon",
     col = "blue")
```
```
